hero.subtitle: The world's first prop firm built natively on the blockchain. Trade with our capital using real-time Binance data. Keep up to 90% of profits. No fiat delays, no hidden fees, just pure crypto.

how.title: How It Works
how.desc: From sign-up to funded account in under 48 hours. No hidden steps, no surprises.
how.step1Desc: Choose from 6 account sizes ($5K to $200K). Select Evaluation for a structured path or Instant Funding to start trading immediately.
how.step2Desc: Hit the profit target while staying within our risk limits. Show consistent, disciplined trading — that's all it takes.
how.step3Desc: Receive your funded account instantly. Keep 80% of profits. Withdraw to crypto or bank — your money, your schedule.

why.title: Built for Traders Who Perform
why.desc: We don't just fund traders — we partner with them. Here's what sets us apart.
why.profitSplitDesc: The highest split in the industry. You keep 80% of every dollar earned. No hidden fees, no profit caps, no fine print.
why.instantDesc: Skip the evaluation entirely. Start trading with real capital today. Same 80% split, zero waiting.
why.lowFeesDesc: Start from just $49. The most accessible prop firm in the world — no other firm gives you this much capital for this little.
why.cryptoDesc: Get paid in BTC, ETH, or USDT. Borderless, fast, and secure. Withdraw anytime — no minimum waiting period.
why.leverageDesc: Maximize your positions with up to 1:100 leverage across multiple cryptocurrency pairs.
why.platformDesc: Real-time charts, 50+ indicators, one-click execution, and advanced risk management — all in your browser.

pricing.title: Choose Your Account Size
pricing.desc: One-time fee. No subscriptions. No recurring charges. Every plan includes 80% profit split.

rules.title: Trading Rules at a Glance
rules.desc: Clear boundaries that protect your account and reward disciplined trading.

faq.title: Got Questions?
faq.desc: Everything you need to know about getting funded with ProFundX.
faq.q1: What is a funded trading account?
faq.a1: A funded trading account gives you real capital to trade with after passing our evaluation. You keep 80% of profits — we take the risk, you take the reward.
faq.q2: How fast can I get funded?
faq.a2: With Instant Funding, you can start trading within minutes. With Evaluation, most traders pass in 5–10 trading days. Account activation is instant upon passing.
faq.q3: What happens if I breach the rules?
faq.a3: If you hit the daily or overall loss limit, that phase is closed. You can purchase a reset or start fresh. Your progress on other metrics is preserved where applicable.
faq.q4: Can I trade during news events?
faq.a4: Yes — ProFundX has no news trading restrictions. Hold positions through high-impact events, trade around NFP, CPI, FOMC — your call.
faq.a5: Request a payout anytime via crypto (BTC, ETH, USDT) or bank transfer. Minimum withdrawal is $50. Most payouts are processed within 24 hours.
faq.q6: Is there a maximum earning cap?
faq.a6: No. There is absolutely no cap on how much you can earn. Some of our traders have withdrawn six-figure sums. Your skill determines your ceiling.

cta.title: Your Next Trade Could Be Funded
cta.desc: 12,000+ traders already earn from ProFundX. Join them — it takes 2 minutes to start.

landing.riskDisclaimer: Trading involves substantial risk of loss and is not suitable for all investors.
